staff.name: Kenji Tanaka
staff.title: Artistic Director & Conductor, Symphony Orchestra
staff.bio: Maestro Tanaka brings over 20 years of international conducting experience. His dynamic leadership and passion for music inspire students to reach new artistic heights. He is a graduate of the Juilliard School.

staff.name: Maria Rossi
staff.title: Conductor, Concert Orchestra
staff.bio: An accomplished violinist and educator, Maria Rossi is dedicated to developing the ensemble skills of intermediate musicians. Her energetic rehearsals create a positive and engaging learning environment.

staff.name: David Chen
staff.title: Upbeat! Program Director & Piano Instructor
staff.bio: David Chen is a specialist in early childhood music education and offers piano lessons for all ages. His innovative approach combines movement, games, and storytelling to introduce young children to the fundamentals of music.
